original_text: "Certifying agent" means an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations.
P: an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations
ig_script_full: E(certifying agent) F(means) P(an entity accredited by the Secretary to certify farms and handling operations).
notes: Definitional constitutive statement. Named entity rule applied: 'Secretary' not decomposed.

original_text: "Organic operation" means a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products.
P: a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products
ig_script_full: E(organic operation) F(means) P(a farm or handling operation that produces or handles organic agricultural products).
notes: Definitional constitutive statement. Disjunctive constituting properties (farm [OR] handling operation) kept as single P at IG Core.

original_text: "National Organic Standards Board" (NOSB) means the advisory board established to assist the Secretary.
P: the advisory board established to assist the Secretary
ig_script_full: E(National Organic Standards Board (NOSB)) F(means) P(the advisory board established to assist the Secretary).
notes: Definitional constitutive statement. Named entity 'National Organic Standards Board' not decomposed per Named Entities Rule.

original_text: A producer of an organic operation must apply for certification with an accredited certifying agent annually.
ig_script_full: A,p(of an organic operation) A(producer) D(must) I(apply for) Bdir(certification) Bind(accredited certifying agent) Cex(annually).
notes: 'With an accredited certifying agent' treated as Bind (entity to whom the application is directed). 'Annually' is temporal Cex.

original_text: Certified organic farmers must not apply synthetic chemicals to crops at any time once organic certification is conferred, or else the certifying agent will revoke certification from the farmer.
O: A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer)
ig_script_full: A,p(Certified organic) A(farmers) D(must not) I(apply) Bdir(synthetic chemicals) Bind(crops) Cac(once organic certification is conferred) Cex(at any time), O{A(certifying agent) D(will) I(revoke) Bdir(certification) Bind(farmer)}.
notes: 'Once organic certification is conferred' is Cac (event activating the prohibition). 'At any time' is temporal Cex. Or-else encoded as nested regulative statement. 'To crops' treated as Bind (receiver of the applied chemicals).

original_text: Upon receiving a certification application, the certifying agent must inspect the applicant's operation within 60 days.
ig_script_full: Cac(upon receiving a certification application) A(certifying agent) D(must) I(inspect) Bdir(the applicant's operation) Cex(within 60 days).
notes: 'Upon receiving a certification application' is Cac (triggering event). 'Within 60 days' is temporal Cex.

original_text: Inspectors must sign and file farm inspection reports following each site visit. [decomposed: sign]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(sign) Bdir(farm inspection reports) Cex(following each site visit).
notes: Decomposed from sentence 2.4 containing two aims (sign [AND] file). S7a encodes 'sign'. Logical combination with S7b: {S7a [AND] S7b}.

original_text: Inspectors must sign and file farm inspection reports following each site visit. [decomposed: file]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(file) Bdir(farm inspection reports) Cex(following each site visit).
notes: Decomposed from sentence 2.4 containing two aims (sign [AND] file). S7b encodes 'file'. Logical combination with S7a: {S7a [AND] S7b}.

original_text: Certifiers and inspectors must seek accreditation renewal every three years. [decomposed: Certifiers]
ig_script_full: A(Certifiers) D(must) I(seek) Bdir(accreditation renewal) Cex(every three years).
notes: Decomposed from sentence 2.5 containing two Attributes (Certifiers [AND] Inspectors). S8a encodes Certifiers. Logical combination with S8b: {S8a [AND] S8b}.

original_text: Certifiers and inspectors must seek accreditation renewal every three years. [decomposed: Inspectors]
ig_script_full: A(Inspectors) D(must) I(seek) Bdir(accreditation renewal) Cex(every three years).
notes: Decomposed from sentence 2.5 containing two Attributes (Certifiers [AND] Inspectors). S8b encodes Inspectors. Logical combination with S8a: {S8a [AND] S8b}.

original_text: When an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act, a written notification of noncompliance shall be sent to the certifying agent.
Cac: when an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act
ig_script_full: Cac(when an inspection by the Program Manager reveals any noncompliance with the Act) A([Program Manager]) D(shall) I(send) Bdir,p(written) Bdir(notification of noncompliance) Bind(certifying agent).
notes: Passive voice converted to active. Actor 'Program Manager' inferred from Cac clause and marked with [ ]. 'Written' encoded as Bdir_prop. 'Noncompliance with the Act' in Cac functions as the triggering event.

original_text: Any operation that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic, except in accordance with the Act, shall be subject to a civil penalty.
A_prop: that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic
Cex: except in accordance with the Act
ig_script_full: A,p(that knowingly sells or labels a product as organic) A(any operation) D(shall) I(be subject to) Bdir(a civil penalty) Cex(except in accordance with the Act).
notes: The prohibited behavior (sells or labels as organic) encoded in A_prop as the defining condition of the actor. 'Except in accordance with the Act' is Cex (procedural constraint/exception). Polymorphic candidate: could alternatively encode the prohibited act as Aim with penalty as Or-else.

original_text: A certifying agent whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section may at any time submit a request for reinstatement of its accreditation.
A_prop: whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section
Bdir: a request for reinstatement of its accreditation
ig_script_full: A,p(whose accreditation is suspended by the Secretary under this section) A(certifying agent) D(may) I(submit) Bdir(a request for reinstatement of its accreditation) Cex(at any time).
notes: A_prop encodes the qualifying condition on the actor (suspended accreditation). 'At any time' is temporal Cex (no timing restriction on submission). Permission statement (D=may).
